description: Floralcraft 35cm Willow Wreath Ring - Natural Enhance your floral designs with the Floralcraft 35cm Willow Wreath, elegantly finished in a grey washed tone. Ideal for florists and crafting enthusiasts, this versatile wreath offers a stylish base for your creative projects. Size: 35cm diameter, perfect for a range of arrangements Material: Durable, high-quality materials suitable for various floral and crafting projects Versatile Use: Ideal for weddings, home decor, and seasonal decorations Easy to Customize: Allows for effortless integration of flowers, ribbons, and other embellishments Craftsmanship: Designed with attention to detail to ensure a refined appearance and lasting durability Elevate your floral creations with the timeless elegance of the Floralcraft 35cm Willow Wreath.
